texto: Quinn wanted to make her see that people didn't live like this
autor: but what was the use. No one was going to get her away from Bird Man out there.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a but what was the use. No one was going to get her away from Bird Man out there.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Quinn wanted to make her see that people didn't live like this” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, thomas-mcguane, quinn pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
